Short CV

Burcu Çevreli was born in Istanbul in 1978. She graduated from Istanbul University, Department of Veterinary Medicine. In 2018, she started her PhD education at Istanbul Medeniyet University, Faculty of Medicine, Department of Physiology. In 2023, she completed her thesis titled “Effects of High Fructose Corn Syrup Consumption on Age-Related Learning and Memory in Rats” and earned her PhD title.

Research interests:

Modeling of neurodegenerative and neurodevelopmental diseases in experimental animals, evaluation of learning and memory performance, behavioral analysis.
